title: Assure validate includes lint
body: Fixed issue where lint was not run on CI, so we missed to prevent regressions.

comments.body: The changes LGTM, but the tests are not at all happy and I'm not sure what's what there.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #4951) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

LGTM. As I mentioned in #4807 I'm uncomfortable with this because I believe it will break `make validate` on some developer environments, but it seems to be passing CI and that's probably more important. Thanks for removing the duplication.
not sure how to fix or re-run the `rdoproject.org/github-check` :confounded:

>not sure how to fix or re-run the rdoproject.org/github-check

Has that one ever passed? I've never seen it green, and always just ignore it.
Yeah, it does sometimes pass :smile:   We can ignore it I think.
